questions.question: The 144,000 standing on Mount Zion had what written on their foreheads?
options: The Lamb's name and his Father's name
questions.correct: The Lamb's name and his Father's name
questions.feedback: They had the Lamb's name and his Father's name written on their foreheads.

questions.question: An angel announces that what great city has fallen?
questions.feedback: Fallen! Fallen is Babylon the Great.

questions.question: An angel says blessed are the dead who die in the Lord from now on.
questions.feedback: Blessed are the dead who die in the Lord — they will rest from their labor.

questions.question: Fear God and give him glory, because the hour of his _____ has come.
questions.feedback: Fear God and give him glory — the hour of his judgment has come.

questions.question: The earth was harvested using a sharp _____.
questions.feedback: The one seated on the cloud swung his sickle over the earth and harvested it.
